news.title: Netflix Chair Reed Hastings to Leave Board in June
news.snippet: Co-founder won't stand for re-election to the board, Netflix says in first earnings report since pulling out of Warner Discovery bid.

news.title: Reed Hastings to Exit Netflix Board
news.snippet: Netflix co-founder and chairman Reed Hastings, who served as CEO for 25 years, is leaving the streaming giant's board of directors.

news.title: Reed Hastings to Step Down as Netflix Chair
news.snippet: The co-founder of the streaming giant will leave its board in June, the company said.

news.title: Netflix co-founder and chair Reed Hastings to leave board
news.snippet: Reed Hastings, the co-founder and chairman of Netflix, is leaving the company's board when his term expires this summer. Hastings is stepping aside to focus...

news.title: Reed Hastings is leaving Netflix after 29 years
news.snippet: Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings is vacating his board seat in June to focus on philanthropy and other projects.
